creator: m@kappa.st
text:
Patch on audio/libmpd is approved. I have also updated the master site 
http://download.gna.org/kanicule/freebsd/distfiles/ with the new tarball.


On Tue, Dec 18, 2007 at 02:50:05PM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of audio/libmpd,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/118821 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/118821
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
